stemHtml:
Given the following information, what is the minimum vertical clearance of the obstacle by the Performance Class B aeroplane?

Cloud base: 400 ft above reference zero
TAS: 101 kt
Nil wind
Obstacle at 15 000 ft from the end of TODR with a height of 600 ft above reference zero
All Engines Rate of Climb (RoC) at Take-off Power: 1630 ft/min
Single Engine Rate of Climb (RoC) at Take-off Power: 300 ft/min
Gross to Net conversion factor: 1.3
Take-off Power can be used throughout the whole climb segment

Still air distance = (height difference / net gradient) x 100
Ground distance = Still air distance x (GS / TAS)
